# 1 Corinthians 3

## Verses (23)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | And the teaching I gave you, my brothers, was such as I was able to give, not to those who have the Spirit, but to those who are still in the flesh, even to children in Christ. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | I gave you milk and not meat, because you were, then, unable to take it, and even now you are not able; | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Because you are still in the flesh: for when there is envy and division among you, are you not still walking after the way of the flesh, even as natural men? | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | For when one says, I am of Paul; and another says, I am of Apollos; are you not talking like natural men? | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | What then is Apollos? and what is Paul? They are but servants who gave you the good news as God gave it to them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | I did the planting, Apollos did the watering, but God gave the increase. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | So then the planter is nothing, and the waterer is nothing; but God who gives the increase. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Now the planter and the waterer are working for the same end: but they will have their separate rewards in the measure of their work. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | For we are workers with God: you are God's planting, God's building. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | In the measure of the grace given to me, I, as a wise master-builder, have put the base in position, and another goes on building on it. But let every man take care what he puts on it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | For there is no other base for the building but that which has been put down, which is Jesus Christ. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | But on the base a man may put gold, silver, stones of great price, wood, dry grass, cut stems; | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Every man's work will be made clear in that day, because it will be tested by fire; and the fire itself will make clear the quality of every man's work. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | If any man's work comes through the test, he will have a reward. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | If the fire puts an end to any man's work, it will be his loss: but he will get salvation himself, though as by fire. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Do you not see that you are God's holy house, and that the Spirit of God has his place in you? | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | If anyone makes the house of God unclean, God will put an end to him; for the house of God is holy, and you are his house. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | Let no man have a false idea. If any man seems to himself to be wise among you, let him become foolish, so that he may be wise. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | For the wisdom of this world is foolish before God. As it is said in the holy Writings, He who takes the wise in their secret designs: | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | And again, The Lord has knowledge of the reasonings of the wise, that they are nothing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | So let no one take pride in men. For all things are yours; | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Paul, or Apollos, or Cephas, or the world, or life, or death, or things present, or things to come; all are yours; | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | And you are Christ's; and Christ is God's. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
